exportType.description: The type of export to perform

severity.description: Severity levels for DLP findings and analyses.
severity.title: DlpSeverity

items.description: Severity levels for DLP findings and analyses.
items.title: DlpSeverity

timePeriodType.description: The type of time period for which to filter findings.

startTime.description: start time of the time range, applicable for the CUSTOM type.

endTime.description: end time of the time range, applicable for the CUSTOM type.

lastNDaysValue.description: The number of days to look back from the current time, applicable for the LAST_N_DAYS type.

fileName.description: The name of the file to export the findings to

fieldScope.description: Controls which fields to include in the export

fieldsToExclude.description: List of field names to exclude from the export
